title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: hwloc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for hwloc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The Portable Hardware Locality (hwloc) software packages provide a portable abstraction of the hierarchical topology of modern architectures, including NUMA memory nodes, shared caches, processor sockets, processor cores and processing units (logical processors or "threads"). hwloc packages gather various system attributes such as cache and memory information, which can be displayed in many formats.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.6 hwloc support upgrade (JIRA:RHEL-118677)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for hwloc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The Portable Hardware Locality (hwloc) software packages provide a portable abstraction of the hierarchical topology of modern architectures, including NUMA memory nodes, shared caches, processor sockets, processor cores and processing units (logical processors or "threads"). hwloc packages gather various system attributes such as cache and memory information, which can be displayed in many formats.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.6 hwloc support upgrade (JIRA:RHEL-118677)
